controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india [regional rural banks- kisan credit card (kcc) scheme] directions, 2026
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India [Regional Rural Banks-
Kisan Credit Card (KCC) Scheme] Directions, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india [regional rural banks- kisan credit card (kcc) scheme] directions, 2026

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to loans sanctioned under the kcc scheme with effect from january 01, 2027
controls.control_description:
The Directions shall be applicable to loans sanctioned under the KCC Scheme with
effect from January 01, 2027.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to loans sanctioned under the kcc scheme with effect from january 01, 2027

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the extant guidelines till maturity / next renewal
controls.control_description:
Loans sanctioned prior to the said date shall continue
to be governed by the extant guidelines till maturity / next renewal.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to continue to be governed by the extant guidelines till maturity / next renewal

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to regional rural banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank') as defined under clause (ja) of s
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Regional Rural Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank') as defined under clause
(ja) of Section 5 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to regional rural banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank') as defined under clause (ja) of s

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them as given below: (1) "crop season" means the period up to harvesting and marketing of the crops raised
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of these Directions, unless the context or subject otherwise
requires, the terms herein shall bear the meanings assigned to them as given below:
(1) "Crop season" means the period up to harvesting and marketing of the crops
raised.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them as given below: (1) "crop season" means the period up to harvesting and marketing of the crops raised

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean crops with anticipated duration from sowing to marketing up to twelve months
controls.control_description:
(2) "Short duration crops" shall mean crops with anticipated duration from sowing to
marketing up to twelve months.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean crops with anticipated duration from sowing to marketing up to twelve months

controls.control_objective: To ensure be standardized at twelve months for short duration crops and eighteen months for long duration crops
controls.control_description:
(4) For the purpose of the KCC Scheme, crop seasons shall be standardized at twelve
months for short duration crops and eighteen months for long duration crops.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be standardized at twelve months for short duration crops and eighteen months for long duration crops

controls.control_objective: To ensure a farmer with landholding of up to one hectare
controls.control_description: (5) "Marginal farmer" means a farmer with landholding of up to one hectare.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a farmer with landholding of up to one hectare

controls.control_objective: To ensure a farmer with landholding of more than one hectare and up to two hectares
controls.control_description:
(6) "Small farmer" means a farmer with landholding of more than one hectare and up
to two hectares.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a farmer with landholding of more than one hectare and up to two hectares

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meanings assigned to them in those acts
controls.control_description:
Words and expressions used herein and not defined in these Directions, but defined
in the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, or the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, shall
have the meanings assigned to them in those Acts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meanings assigned to them in those acts

controls.control_objective: To ensure extend credit to eligible borrowers for their farming and other needs as indicated below in the form of a composite facility with a tenure of six year
controls.control_description:
Under the KCC Scheme, banks shall extend credit to eligible borrowers for their
farming and other needs as indicated below in the form of a composite facility with a
tenure of six years:
(1) Short term credit requirements for cultivation of crops;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to extend credit to eligible borrowers for their farming and other needs as indicated below in the form of a composite facility with a tenure of six year

controls.control_objective: To ensure form the short-term credit limit portion of the composite facility and the component at (8) shall constitute the long- term credit limit portion of th
controls.control_description:
The aggregate of components at (1) to (7) above shall form the short-term credit
limit portion of the composite facility and the component at (8) shall constitute the long-
term credit limit portion of the facility.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to form the short-term credit limit portion of the composite facility and the component at (8) shall constitute the long- term credit limit portion of th

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the composite maximum permissible limit (cmpl) and is to be treated as the kcc limit
controls.control_description:
The short-term credit limit fixed for the sixth year together with the estimated long-
term credit limit shall be the Composite Maximum Permissible Limit (CMPL) and is to
be treated as the KCC limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be the composite maximum permissible limit (cmpl) and is to be treated as the kcc limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in the nature of revolving cash credit facility
controls.control_description:
The short-term component of the KCC limit for the purposes of crop cultivation and
allied activities shall be in the nature of revolving cash credit facility.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in the nature of revolving cash credit facility

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no restriction on the number of debits and credits
controls.control_description:
There shall be no
restriction on the number of debits and credits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no restriction on the number of debits and credits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to avail credit for working capital requirements for cultivation of crops: (1) farmers (individual / joint borrowers), who are owner culti
controls.control_description:
Eligibility
The following shall be eligible to avail credit for working capital requirements for
cultivation of crops:
(1) Farmers (individual / joint borrowers), who are owner cultivators;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to avail credit for working capital requirements for cultivation of crops: (1) farmers (individual / joint borrowers), who are owner culti

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the sum total of the following: note: refer a (i), (ii), (iii) and (iv) of illustrations 1 and 2 given in the annex i
controls.control_description:
Fixation of Drawing Limit
(1) The drawing limit for each crop season shall be the sum total of the following:
Note: Refer A (I), (II), (III) and (IV) of Illustrations 1 and 2 given in the Annex I.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the sum total of the following: note: refer a (i), (ii), (iii) and (iv) of illustrations 1 and 2 given in the annex i

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be eligible for a flexible credit limit of ₹10,000 to ₹50,000 (as flexi kcc) as per assessment of the bank without relating it to the value of th
controls.control_description:
(7) Marginal farmers shall also be eligible for a flexible credit limit of ₹10,000 to
₹50,000 (as Flexi KCC) as per assessment of the bank without relating it to the value
of the land.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to also be eligible for a flexible credit limit of ₹10,000 to ₹50,000 (as flexi kcc) as per assessment of the bank without relating it to the value of th

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on crops grown, post-harvest warehouse
controls.control_description: The credit limit shall be based on crops grown, post-harvest warehouse
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on crops grown, post-harvest warehouse

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reworked by taking into consideration the crops proposed to be grown
controls.control_description:
(2) In case the cropping pattern adopted by the farmer changes for any subsequent
season, the drawing limit shall be reworked by taking into consideration the crops
proposed to be grown.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reworked by taking into consideration the crops proposed to be grown

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider applying a 10 per cent notional hike over the sof applicable for the previous season and determine the drawable limit for the ensuing season
controls.control_description:
(3) In situations where the SoF has not been notified by SLTC for a particular crop
season, at the time of the farmer availing the loan, the bank shall consider applying a
10 per cent notional hike over the SoF applicable for the previous season and
determine the drawable limit for the ensuing season.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to consider applying a 10 per cent notional hike over the sof applicable for the previous season and determine the drawable limit for the ensuing season

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt the existing sof
controls.control_description:
However, in cases where the
SoF has been notified but not revised, banks shall adopt the existing SoF.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt the existing sof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be outside the kcc framework
controls.control_description:
(4) In respect of crops not covered in the SoF finalised by the SLTC / DLTC of the
respective State, loans extended shall be outside the KCC framework.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be outside the kcc framework

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made to get the sof of such crops notified by the sltc / dltc
controls.control_description:
However,
efforts must be made to get the SoF of such crops notified by the SLTC / DLTC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made to get the sof of such crops notified by the sltc / dltc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be rounded off to the nearest ₹1,000
controls.control_description: (5) The KCC credit limit shall be rounded off to the nearest ₹1,000.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be rounded off to the nearest ₹1,000

controls.control_objective: To ensure be arrived at on a notional basis by adding 10 per cent to the limit of the previous crop season, from the second crop season onwards
controls.control_description:
(6) At the time of sanction, the maximum permissible limit (MPL) for the short-term
crop loan shall be arrived at on a notional basis by adding 10 per cent to the limit of
the previous crop season, from the second crop season onwards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be arrived at on a notional basis by adding 10 per cent to the limit of the previous crop season, from the second crop season onwards

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reassessed at the time of review
controls.control_description:
In case the drawing
limit exceeds the MPL in any crop season / year, the MPL shall be reassessed at the
time of review.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reassessed at the time of review

controls.control_objective: To ensure fix the repayment period as per the crop season applicable
controls.control_description:
Repayment Period
Banks shall fix the repayment period as per the crop season applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to fix the repayment period as per the crop season applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to avail credit for working capital requirements for allied activities: (1) animal husbandry farmers, fishers, fish farmers and farmers (i
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to avail credit for working capital requirements for allied activities: (1) animal husbandry farmers, fishers, fish farmers and farmers (i

controls.control_objective: To ensure fix the drawing limits for allied activities based on the sof [as notified by sltc / dltc] for the respective activities and number of units (acre / u
controls.control_description:
Fixation of Drawing Limit
(1) Banks shall fix the drawing limits for allied activities based on the SoF [as notified
by SLTC / DLTC] for the respective activities and number of units (acre / unit / animal
/ bird, etc.) by adopting the method analogous to that of working capital loans for
cultivation of crops as indicated at paragraph 12 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to fix the drawing limits for allied activities based on the sof [as notified by sltc / dltc] for the respective activities and number of units (acre / u

controls.control_objective: To ensure be outside the kcc framework
controls.control_description:
(2) In respect of allied activities not covered in the SoF finalised by the SLTC / DLTC
of the respective State, loans extended shall be outside the KCC framework.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be outside the kcc framework

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made to get the sof of such allied activities notified by the sltc / dltc
controls.control_description:
However,
efforts must be made to get the SoF of such allied activities notified by the SLTC /
DLTC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made to get the sof of such allied activities notified by the sltc / dltc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned separately for each activity
controls.control_description:
(3) In cases where a borrower avails credit for both crop cultivation and allied activities
under the KCC framework, the additional component towards consumption
requirements (10 per cent) shall be considered only once and shall not be reckoned
separately for each activity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned separately for each activity

controls.control_objective: To ensure fix the repayment period as per the cash flow / income generation pattern of the activity undertaken by the borrower
controls.control_description:
Repayment Period
Banks shall fix the repayment period as per the cash flow / income generation pattern
of the activity undertaken by the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to fix the repayment period as per the cash flow / income generation pattern of the activity undertaken by the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to avail investment credit for purposes related to agriculture and allied activities, illustratively: (1) land development (2) minor irrig
controls.control_description:
Eligibility
Beneficiaries specified in paragraph 11 and 14 above shall be eligible to avail
investment credit for purposes related to agriculture and allied activities, illustratively:
(1) land development
(2) minor irrigation
(3) purchase of farm / fishing, etc., equipment
(4) construction of animal / bird shed
(5) purchase of livestock
(6) purchase of equipment related to allied activities, and
(7) similar other purposes
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to avail investment credit for purposes related to agriculture and allied activities, illustratively: (1) land development (2) minor irrig

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on the proposed investment(s) during the tenure of the kcc facility and the bank's assessment of the repaying capacity of the borrower
controls.control_description:
Fixation of Limit
(1) The term loan limit shall be based on the proposed investment(s) during the tenure
of the KCC facility and the bank's assessment of the repaying capacity of the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on the proposed investment(s) during the tenure of the kcc facility and the bank's assessment of the repaying capacity of the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed based on the nature of investment
controls.control_description: (2) The draw down of instalments shall be allowed based on the nature of investment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed based on the nature of investment

controls.control_objective: To ensure be repayable within a period of six years depending on the type of activity / investment, as per the bank's credit policy applicable for investment cr
controls.control_description:
Repayment Period
The term-loan component shall be repayable within a period of six years depending
on the type of activity / investment, as per the bank's credit policy applicable for
investment credit.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be repayable within a period of six years depending on the type of activity / investment, as per the bank's credit policy applicable for investment cr

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as a separate facility outside the kcc framework
controls.control_description:
If the nature of investment involves a tenure longer than six years,
the term loan may be treated as a separate facility outside the KCC framework.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be treated as a separate facility outside the kcc framework

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as stipulated in reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - interest rates on advances) directions,2025 dated november 28, 2025, as amended from
controls.control_description:
The rate of interest shall be as stipulated in Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural
Banks - Interest Rates on Advances) Directions,2025 dated November 28, 2025, as
amended from time to time and as per other relevant guidelines issued in respect of
charging interest on agricultural advances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as stipulated in reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - interest rates on advances) directions,2025 dated november 28, 2025, as amended from

controls.control_objective: To ensure pay interest on the minimum credit balance in kcc cash credit accounts as stipulated in the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - interest rat
controls.control_description:
Banks shall pay interest on the minimum credit balance in KCC cash credit
accounts as stipulated in the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Interest
Rate on Deposits) Directions, 2025 dated November 28, 2025 (Updated as on June
17, 2026), as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pay interest on the minimum credit balance in kcc cash credit accounts as stipulated in the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - interest rat

controls.control_objective: To ensure waive collateral security and margin requirements for agricultural loans including loans for allied activities up to ₹2 lakh per borrower
controls.control_description:
Banks shall waive collateral security and margin requirements for agricultural loans
including loans for allied activities up to ₹2 lakh per borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to waive collateral security and margin requirements for agricultural loans including loans for allied activities up to ₹2 lakh per borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain and retain explicit declaration from the borrower in such cases
controls.control_description:
Banks shall obtain and retain explicit declaration from the borrower
in such cases.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain and retain explicit declaration from the borrower in such cases

controls.control_objective: To ensure decide the collateral security and margin requirements for loans above ₹2 lakh as per their credit policy and in adherence with rbi guidelines issued
controls.control_description:
Banks shall decide the collateral security and margin requirements for loans above
₹2 lakh as per their credit policy and in adherence with RBI guidelines issued from
time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to decide the collateral security and margin requirements for loans above ₹2 lakh as per their credit policy and in adherence with rbi guidelines issued

controls.control_objective: To ensure waive collateral security for loans up to a limit of ₹3 lakh
controls.control_description:
In case of KCC loans against hypothecation of crops / stock and involving tie-up
arrangements for recovery, banks may waive collateral security for loans up to a limit
of ₹3 lakh.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to waive collateral security for loans up to a limit of ₹3 lakh

controls.control_objective: To ensure be divided into sub-limits for short-term cash credit limit-cum-savings accounts for crop cultivation and allied activities separately, and long-term
controls.control_description:
Considering the different interest rates and repayment schedules applicable to
various types of credit provided under KCC, the facility may be divided into sub-limits
for short-term cash credit limit-cum-savings accounts for crop cultivation and allied
activities separately, and long-term loan for agriculture and allied activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be divided into sub-limits for short-term cash credit limit-cum-savings accounts for crop cultivation and allied activities separately, and long-term

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained as separate loan accounts under the composite kcc facility
controls.control_description:
For
<image>
operational convenience, these sub-limits shall be maintained as separate loan
accounts under the composite KCC facility.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained as separate loan accounts under the composite kcc facility

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure ongoing monitoring of the end use of the credit facility by the borrower as per the terms of sanction through field inspections and / or other
controls.control_description:
Banks shall ensure ongoing monitoring of the end use of the credit facility by the
borrower as per the terms of sanction through field inspections and / or other means,
as per their credit policy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure ongoing monitoring of the end use of the credit facility by the borrower as per the terms of sanction through field inspections and / or other

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake review and renewal of the short-term limits for crop cultivation and allied activities as per their credit policy
controls.control_description:
Banks shall undertake review and renewal of the short-term limits for crop
cultivation and allied activities as per their credit policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to undertake review and renewal of the short-term limits for crop cultivation and allied activities as per their credit policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain a one-time documentation including land record / tenancy certificate / equivalent certificate as per their credit policy at the time of applica
controls.control_description:
Banks shall obtain a one-time documentation including land record / tenancy
certificate / equivalent certificate as per their credit policy at the time of application for
fresh loan.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to obtain a one-time documentation including land record / tenancy certificate / equivalent certificate as per their credit policy at the time of applica

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain declaration from the borrower(s) regarding proposed activity / activities
controls.control_description:
During the tenure of the facility, at the time of each review, the bank shall
obtain declaration from the borrower(s) regarding proposed activity / activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain declaration from the borrower(s) regarding proposed activity / activities

controls.control_objective: To ensure accept certificates provided by local administration / panchayati raj institutions regarding the cultivation of crops by such borrowers
controls.control_description:
In case of loans to sharecroppers and oral lessees, banks shall accept certificates
provided by local administration / panchayati raj institutions regarding the cultivation
of crops by such borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to accept certificates provided by local administration / panchayati raj institutions regarding the cultivation of crops by such borrowers

controls.control_objective: To ensure accept an affidavit submitted by such borrowers giving their occupational status (i
controls.control_description:
Where there are difficulties in getting certification
regarding identity and occupational status of sharecroppers and oral lessees, banks
shall accept an affidavit submitted by such borrowers giving their occupational status
(i.e., details of land tilled / crops grown), for loans up to ₹50,000.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to accept an affidavit submitted by such borrowers giving their occupational status (i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the bank's policy on applicable charges and applicable regulatory guidelines
controls.control_description:
Processing fees, inspection charges and other charges shall be as per the bank's
policy on applicable charges and applicable regulatory guidelines, if any.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be as per the bank's policy on applicable charges and applicable regulatory guidelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure pay the premium through the kcc account
controls.control_description:
The KCC holder will have the option to avail any type of crop insurance, asset
insurance, accident insurance (including Personal Accident Insurance Scheme) or
health insurance and may pay the premium through the KCC account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pay the premium through the kcc account

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made aware of the insurance covers available
controls.control_description:
Beneficiaries
shall be made aware of the insurance covers available.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made aware of the insurance covers available

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained, at the application stage itself if the premium is to be paid through the kcc account
controls.control_description:
Their explicit consent shall be
obtained, at the application stage itself if the premium is to be paid through the KCC
account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained, at the application stage itself if the premium is to be paid through the kcc account

controls.control_objective: To ensure be assigned in favour of the lending bank
controls.control_description:
In case insurance (crop insurance, asset insurance and personal accident
insurance) is funded under the KCC facility, the same shall be assigned in favour of
the lending bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be assigned in favour of the lending bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed as per the convenience of the farmer using any of the following delivery channels: (1) operation through banking outlet / part-time banking
controls.control_description:
Draw down of the limit shall be allowed as per the convenience of the farmer using
any of the following delivery channels:
(1) operation through banking outlet / part-time banking outlet (as defined in the
Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Branch Authorisation) Directions, 2025
dated November 28, 2025 as amended from time to time) and business
correspondents
(2) operation through ATMs / micro-ATMs / PoS terminals, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed as per the convenience of the farmer using any of the following delivery channels: (1) operation through banking outlet / part-time banking

controls.control_objective: To ensure enable operations in kcc accounts through unified payments interface (for working capital credit), debit cards (as stipulated in reserve bank of india
controls.control_description:
Banks shall enable operations in KCC accounts through Unified Payments
Interface (for working capital credit), debit cards (as stipulated in Reserve Bank of India
(Regional Rural Banks - Credit Cards and Debit Cards: Issuance and Conduct)
Directions, 2025 dated November 28, 2025 as amended from time to time.), mobile
banking, internet banking, National Electronic Funds Transfer (NEFT), Real Time
Gross Settlement (RTGS), Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC) or any other
regulated digital delivery channel, after obtaining explicit consent of the account
holder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enable operations in kcc accounts through unified payments interface (for working capital credit), debit cards (as stipulated in reserve bank of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider such request as per established procedure and guidelines
controls.control_description:
In case the farmer applies for loan against the warehouse receipt of the produce,
the bank shall consider such request as per established procedure and guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to consider such request as per established procedure and guidelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure be linked with the related short- term kcc loan
controls.control_description:
The loan extended to the farmer in such case shall be linked with the related short-
term KCC loan, if any, and the outstanding amount in such loan shall be adjusted at
the time of disbursal of the loan secured by warehouse receipt.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be linked with the related short- term kcc loan

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the instructions regarding interest subvention and prompt repayment incentive on kcc loans, as applicable from time to time
controls.control_description:
Banks shall adhere to the instructions regarding interest subvention and prompt
repayment incentive on KCC loans, as applicable from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the instructions regarding interest subvention and prompt repayment incentive on kcc loans, as applicable from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to loans granted under the kcc scheme
controls.control_description:
Prudential norms on income recognition, asset-classification and provisioning as
stipulated in the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Income Recognition,
Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025 dated November 28, 2025, as
amended from time to time, shall apply to loans granted under the KCC Scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to loans granted under the kcc scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit data on kcc loans to nabard as per the prescribed reporting format
controls.control_description:
Banks shall submit data on KCC loans to NABARD as per the prescribed reporting
format.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit data on kcc loans to nabard as per the prescribed reporting format

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or Directions, for the time being in
force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure be rounded off to the nearest ₹1,000
controls.control_description:
Drawing limit for subsequent seasons
Crop Season Calculation Drawing
limit#
1 Drawing Limit- 1st Season [Sub-total (A) + (B)] ₹93,000
2 = 74,000 (2 acre × 16,000 + 2 acre × 21,000) + 10% + 20% + 2,100 (Cost of insurance) ₹98,300
3 = 78,000 (2 acre × 17,000 + 2 acre × 22,000) + 10% + 20% + 2,200 (Cost of insurance) ₹1,03,600
4 = 84,000 (2 acre × 18,000 + 2 acre × 24,000) + 10% + 20% + 2,350 (Cost of insurance) ₹1,11,550
5 = 94,000 (2 acre × 20,000 + 2 acre × 27,000) + 10% + 20% + 2,650 (Cost of insurance) ₹1,24,850
6 = 1,01,000 (2 acre × 21,500 + 2 acre × 29,000) + 10% + 20% + 2,850(Cost of insurance) ₹1,34,150
